title: siteScraper emails are EXTRACTED, not SMTP-verified — no deliverability stage in this flow
summary: siteScraper is a single-worker crawl: it scrapes emails/phones off the page but does NOT verify them. The emails[] in the results carry no deliverability status/score (that's the lead chain's SpiderVerify stage). Treat them as candidates. If the user needs deliverable addresses, run flow:maps-site-verify-vayapin (which adds SpiderVerify) or feed the extracted emails into the emailVerify flow. Don't promise 'verified' contacts from a bare site crawl.
references: app/schemas/spider_site.py:664-665 — SpiderSiteData.emails is a plain List[str], no status/score
app/flows/siteScraper.yaml:7 — dispatch_type spiderSite, single worker (no verify step)
../../maps-site-verify-vayapin/recipes/run-single.md — the chain that DOES verify emails
